publication_scope.notes: PDF assets live under /assets/articlePDFs/; exclude inner matter from article holdings.

evidence.notes: Only /craft/ is disallowed; volume and asset paths are allowed.
Requested /volumes redirects to Volume 39. Sidebar exposes 40 volume/special-issue links; two h2 issue headings expose 2025-2026, article/notes/forum sections, direct PDFs, and trailing author text.

Single smoke returned a 1,181,589-byte PDF beginning %PDF-1.6; first page confirms Volume 39 Number 2 Spring 2026, title, and both authors; SHA-256 e37f04ed0a1036bda580f37f339058d485a73db9934ecf7bf6ca8814705ec23f.

reconnaissance.notes: Current volume discovery and direct file delivery pass; older layout transitions remain unsampled.

include: Print articles, notes, and forum pieces listed on volume pages
exclude: Issue table of contents, mastheads, sponsors, and other inner matter
scope.notes: Use section headings to retain article/note/forum type.

entry_points.notes: Redirects to newest volume while retaining the full volume sidebar.

nodes.notes: Issue headings and direct file records.

edges.notes: Includes one special issue and historical slug variants.

edges.locator: div.volume__articles ul li > a[href$='.pdf'], div.volume__notes ul li > a[href$='.pdf']
edges.notes: Exclude anchors whose text or filename denotes inner matter.

archive_patterns.notes: Several historical variants; follow sidebar rather than synthesize.

pagination.notes: 40 links including special issue; follow individually.

layout_eras.label: Craft CMS volume page with direct assets
Historical volumes
layout_eras.notes: Sidebar establishes routes but layouts are unsampled.

sources.locator: div.volume__articles ul li > a[href$='.pdf'], div.volume__notes ul li > a[href$='.pdf']
sources.example: Majoritarian Signals: Harnessing GenAI to Inform Judicial Standards

sources.locator: li text after the PDF anchor and hyphen

authors.missingness: Present for article records; inner matter has none and is excluded.

sources.example: This Article presents a systematic framework for incorporating majoritarian signals from generative AI...

year.missingness: Present in both sampled issue headings.

patterns.locator: div.volume__articles ul li > a[href$='.pdf'], div.volume__notes ul li > a[href$='.pdf']
patterns.notes: Normal GET returned matching article PDF.

validation.notes: First-page title, authors, volume, issue, and year match HTML.

access.politeness_notes: Robots first; one redirecting volume seed and one PDF smoke only.

verdict.summary: Current volume pages expose deterministic title, author, volume, issue, season/year, and direct article PDFs; representative PDF smoke passed.
blockers: Middle and oldest volume layouts are unsampled
Historical slug variants require link-following rather than synthesis
verdict.next_action: Sample one middle and oldest sidebar volume, then activate the existing HarvardJOLTAdapter for full traversal.
verdict.implementation_notes: Use the volume sidebar, scope records by issue h2 and section h3, parse trailing author text, and exclude inner matter.
